priority_tagged_entities_rev5_delta.note: Some entities carry multiple PIR tags (e.g., Annuar Musa = PIR-06+PIR-07; Samsuri = PIR-07+PIR-06). Unique priority-tagged entities in rev5 delta: 9 of 9 (ALL new entities are PIR-priority-tagged). The rev5 delta is weighted entirely toward the PIR-priority negative axis.

trends.overall_rev5: PH-FAVORABLE TILT STRENGTHENS FURTHER; PIR-06 ESCALATES TO TWO-SIDED PRINCIPAL-LEVEL MOTION. The dominant development of the 170837 cycle is the ESCALATION of the PIR-06 PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread from ONE-SIDED senior-figure advocacy (rev4: Kiandee, suspended VP, calls ON PN-MT to remove Bersatu) to TWO-SIDED/THREE-SIDED principal-level coalition-restructuring motion (rev5: Bersatu PRESIDENT Muhyiddin publicly hints at exit + signals new post-election bloc + Annuar Musa corroborates + PAS openly sidelines Bersatu + Hadi blame-shifts + mainstream 'imminent?' framing). The opposition is now fractured on ALL THREE sides simultaneously. No formal notice of either type (PN-MT removal OR Bersatu withdrawal) has issued. PIR-09 adds a third disciplinary action (MCA silencing of Saw Yee Fung) and a Day-1 abrasive-rhetoric datum (Albert Tei 'barking dogs'). PIR-07 confirms the BN-PN electoral understanding is operational (PAS-led) and surfaces DAP anti-BN intra-unity tension. The 182751 cycle is a STABILITY/CONFIRMATION pass (0 new articles, 10/10 sources, 0 errors). No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold; the material movement is qualitative (PIR-06 two-sided escalation) and new PIR-09 entities.
trends.pir06_trend: ESCALATING toward formalization via EITHER path. Progression: 15:09 'could face termination' → 16:33 'info chief floats termination' → 19:19 'has grounds to remove' (NST, Kiandee) → 22:20 SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh') [rev4] → 01:08 MYT 19 Jul PRINCIPAL-LEVEL EXIT SIGNALING (Muhyiddin 'Goodbye PN?'; Annuar Musa 'part ways'; PAS 'rift widens'; Hadi 'blames Bersatu'; mainstream 'imminent?') [rev5]. THREE-SIDED: PN-MT-may-remove (Kiandee) + Bersatu-may-exit (Muhyiddin/Annuar Musa) + PAS-sidelining (Hadi). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice yet. Trajectory: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible. Trigger #2 CLOSER than rev4.
trends.pir09_trend: THREE disciplinary/credibility events now: (1) Gerakan expels Tang Jay Son (carryover, reconfirmed); (2) Mohamad Rafie cross-bloc defector (carryover, reconfirmed); (3) NEW rev5: MCA silences Youth sec-gen Saw Yee Fung over BN-PN criticism (candidate-campaign exclusion). PLUS NEW rev5: Albert Tei (PN camp) 'barking dogs' abrasive rhetoric at Jelebu nomination centre. PLUS carryover: Bujang Abu eligibility failure (marginal). The disciplinary pattern bridges to PIR-06.
trends.pir07_trend: Day-1 campaign active across 8 watch seats (carryover). NEW context: BN-PN electoral understanding confirmed operational and PAS-led (Hadi/Asyraf Wajdi/Zahid); DAP revives anti-BN campaign (intra-unity tension); Samsuri signals post-election BN continuation contingent on NS result. No new Day-1 campaign events in the deep-overnight window. 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); 2 five-cornered (N.10, N.33) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi). Next meaningful update expected daytime MYT 19 Jul (Day-2).
trends.negative_sentiment_trend: Opposition-cohesion negatives deepen on ALL THREE sides: ESC-011 (Bersatu-PN fracture) 0.75→0.80; Bersatu (party) 0.70→0.74; ESC-014 (PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread) 0.76→0.82 (qualitative two-sided escalation). New PIR-06 negatives: Muhyiddin 0.80 (exit hint), Annuar Musa 0.72 (part-ways), PAS/Hadi 0.70 (sidelining/blame-shift). New PIR-09 negatives: Saw Yee Fung 0.55 (MCA silencing), Albert Tei 0.52 (abrasive rhetoric). All maximally favourable to PH.
trends.positive_sentiment_trend: No new positive entities in the rev5 delta (deep-overnight window produced no new PH-favorable campaign content). PH-favorable positives are carryover from rev4: Aminuddin 0.61, Azizul 0.53, Jalaluddin 0.55, SPR-confirmed configuration 0.62. The PH-favorable structural tilt STRENGTHENS indirectly via the deepening opposition fracture (PIR-06 two-sided escalation).
trends.neutral_sentiment_trend: New neutrals: mainstream 'imminent?' framing 0.55 (PIR-06); BN-PN understanding operational 0.55 (PIR-07, PAS-led); DAP anti-BN tension 0.50 (PIR-07); Samsuri post-election continuation 0.52 (PIR-07). Carryover: N.14 Ampangan 0.50, Nazri 0.48, MB-candidate deferred 0.50, Fuziah 0.52, Bujang Abu 0.45.
trends.numeric_shift_threshold: No entity exceeds 30% numeric shift in the rev4→rev5 delta (largest: ESC-014 +7.9%, ESC-011 +6.7%, Bersatu +5.7%). No direction flips. The PIR-06 qualitative escalation (one-sided → two-sided/three-sided principal-level) is FLAGGED as a CRITICAL sentiment shift per director directive.

PIR-06.directive: Sentiment around PN-Bersatu relationship (removal, expulsion, withdrawal narratives)
PIR-06.assessment: ESCALATING — TWO-SIDED/THREE-SIDED principal-level motion. Bersatu PRESIDENT Muhyiddin publicly hints at exit (wishes PN 'all the best', raps Samsuri for unilaterally entering BN pact and sidelining Bersatu, signals new post-election bloc). Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa corroborates (own-logo = part-ways). PAS openly sidelines Bersatu ('PN rift widens'); Hadi blame-shifts ('blames Bersatu instead'). Mainstream frames exit as 'imminent?' THREE-SIDED: PN-MT-may-remove (Kiandee, carryover) + Bersatu-may-exit (Muhyiddin/Annuar Musa) + PAS-sidelining (Hadi). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued — status remains precursor/lead/hint. Bersatu contests 24 seats under own flag (SPR-confirmed). 8 Tier-4 seats mapped: 4 vs PAS (Serting, Ampangan, Paroi, Bagan Pinang) + 4 vs Wawasan (Klawang, Sikamat, Mambau, Gemas). Trajectory: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible. Maximally favourable to PH.

PIR-09.directive: Sentiment around candidate credibility (disciplinary actions, defections, eligibility)
PIR-09.assessment: THREE candidate-credibility events: (1) Gerakan expels Tang Jay Son (carryover, reconfirmed) for contesting under Bersatu ticket in N.22 Rahang; (2) Mohamad Rafie (2018 PH winner) cross-bloc defector to PN-PAS in N.14 Ampangan (carryover, reconfirmed); (3) NEW rev5: MCA Youth sec-gen Saw Yee Fung told to 'stay out of NS polls' over BN-PN criticism — internal BN-component disciplinary silencing. PLUS NEW rev5: Albert Tei (PN camp, Jelebu) 'barking dogs' abrasive rhetoric toward PH supporters. PLUS carryover: Bujang Abu eligibility failure (marginal). The disciplinary pattern (Gerakan pecat + MCA silencing + Kiandee/Bersatu signal) supports the broader PIR-06 fracture.

NEW context: BN-PN electoral understanding confirmed operational and PAS-led (Hadi/Asyraf Wajdi/Zahid cluster); DAP revives anti-BN campaign (1MDB, ruler crisis) — intra-unity PH-component tension; Samsuri signals PN may continue BN cooperation if NS results positive — post-election coalition intent contingent on NS result. No new Day-1 campaign events or poll/forecast publications in the deep-overnight window. 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); 2 five-cornered (N.10, N.33) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN momentum (carryover): Jalaluddin Jelebu + manifesto 24 Jul. PH momentum (carryover): Aminuddin defensive-governance + Azizul civil 'friendship match' + Fuziah measured strategy + Nazri 50/50 candour.

PIR-06_critical_shift.prior_state_rev4: ONE-SIDED senior-figure public advocacy. Kiandee (suspended Bersatu VP) calls ON the PN Supreme Council to remove Bersatu ('asas kukuh'). A suspended figure's call, not the principal's action.
PIR-06_critical_shift.new_state_rev5: TWO-SIDED/THREE-SIDED principal-level coalition-restructuring motion. Bersatu PRESIDENT Muhyiddin publicly hints at exit (wishes PN 'all the best', raps Samsuri, signals new post-election bloc); Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa corroborates (own-logo = part-ways); PAS openly sidelines Bersatu ('PN rift widens'); Hadi blame-shifts; mainstream frames exit as 'imminent?' The motion now operates on all three sides: PN-MT-may-remove (Kiandee) + Bersatu-may-exit (Muhyiddin/Annuar Musa) + PAS-sidelining (Hadi).
PIR-06_critical_shift.classification: CRITICAL PIR-06 SENTIMENT SHIFT (qualitative escalation from one-sided suspended-VP advocacy to two-sided/three-sided principal-level coalition-restructuring motion; second consecutive revision to escalate)
PIR-06_critical_shift.trigger_proximity: CLOSER than rev4. Trigger #2 (coalition restructuring) now reachable via EITHER path: (a) PN-MT formal removal, or (b) Bersatu formal exit/realignment. Per trajectory assessment: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible if Bersatu damages PN in the 8 Tier-4 seats. NO trigger has fired — no formal notice of either type.
PIR-06_critical_shift.escalation_progression: rev3 (precursor/NST headline) → rev4 (senior-figure advocacy/Kiandee full body) → rev5 (two-sided principal-level exit signaling/Muhyiddin + Annuar Musa + PAS + 'imminent?' framing)

verdict: CAMPAIGN DAY 1 DEEP-OVERNIGHT CONFIRMATION (02:35 MYT 19 Jul) ESCALATES the PIR-06 PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread to a TWO-SIDED/THREE-SIDED PRINCIPAL-LEVEL COALITION-RESTRUCTURING MOTION — the second consecutive revision to escalate (rev3 precursor → rev4 senior-figure advocacy → rev5 two-sided principal-level exit signaling). The Bersatu PRESIDENT Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin publicly hints at exit from PN (Malaysiakini, 170837): wishing PN 'all the best', rapping PN chairperson Samsuri for unilaterally entering the BN pact and sidelining Bersatu, and signaling a NEW coalition/bloc after the NS polls. Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa corroborates (own-logo = part-ways). PAS openly sidelines Bersatu ('PN rift widens'); Hadi blame-shifts ('blames Bersatu instead'). Mainstream frames exit as 'imminent?' The motion is now THREE-SIDED: PN-MT-may-remove (Kiandee) + Bersatu-may-exit (Muhyiddin/Annuar Musa) + PAS-sidelining (Hadi). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued — status remains precursor/lead/hint. Per trajectory assessment, the most likely near-term outcome is Bersatu voluntarily realigning AFTER the Aug 1 poll rather than a formal PN-MT expulsion beforehand — but a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible. PIR-09 adds a THIRD disciplinary event (MCA silencing of Saw Yee Fung over BN-PN criticism) and a Day-1 abrasive-rhetoric datum (Albert Tei 'barking dogs' at Jelebu). PIR-07 confirms the BN-PN electoral understanding is operational and PAS-led, surfaces DAP anti-BN intra-unity tension, and notes Samsuri's post-election continuation intent. The 182751 cycle is a STABILITY/CONFIRMATION pass (0 new articles, 10/10 sources, 0 errors). No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold (largest: ESC-014 +7.9%); the PIR-06 qualitative escalation (one-sided → two-sided/three-sided principal-level) is FLAGGED as a CRITICAL sentiment shift per director directive. No trigger fired; trigger #2 (coalition restructuring) is CLOSER than rev4 — now reachable via EITHER path. Net NS-relevant sentiment remains PH-favorable: the opposition is now fractured on all three sides simultaneously, and the Bersatu president's exit-hint is the strongest signal yet that the coalition restructuring is in motion — maximally benefiting the incumbent. CLASSIFICATION: TLP:AMBER.
